mapper.select:
SELECT v.vehicle_id, v.vehicle_number, v.audit_status, v.bracket_id, b.bracket_no, v.disabled_flag FROM t_vehicle v LEFT JOIN t_bracket b ON v.bracket_id = b.bracket_id WHERE v.deleted_flag = #{queryForm.deletedFlag} AND v.create_user_id = #{queryForm.driverId} AND v.create_user_type = #{queryForm.userType}
AND INSTR(v.vehicle_number, #{queryForm.keywords})

SELECT v.* FROM t_driver_vehicle dv LEFT JOIN t_vehicle v ON dv.vehicle_id = v.vehicle_id
dv.driver_id = #{driverId} AND v.deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag}
